info.name: Claude Bridge Server
info.description:
API collection for Claude Bridge — an HTTP bridge between AI agents and Claude Code CLI.

Includes: basic tasks, chains, and real-world workflow recipes (bug investigation, security review, refactoring, etc.)

request.description: Check server health, uptime, active/queued counts, and workspace path.

query.description: Filter: queued, running, done, error, cancelled, timeout

request.description: List all jobs with optional filters.
List only completed jobs.
List jobs for a specific agent.

Submit a task asynchronously. Returns taskId immediately — poll /status/:taskId for the result.

Auto-saves taskId to environment variable.

Submit a task and wait for the full result. Response includes result text, duration, resultFile path.

This can take a long time — increase Postman timeout to 10+ minutes in Settings > General > Request timeout.
Submit a task with inline context text. The bridge saves it to a temp file and passes it to Claude.
Submit a task referencing an existing file (e.g., a previous task's result) as context.
Submit a task with a custom working directory for the Claude process.
Poll this after submitting an async task. Returns full job details including result when done.
Cancel a queued or running task. Sends SIGTERM to the Claude process.

Submit a multi-step chain. Each step runs sequentially. Steps with usesPreviousResult=true receive the previous step's output as context.

Auto-saves chainId to environment variable.
A simple 2-step chain: create content then translate it.
Check progress of a chain. Shows current step and per-step status/duration.

item.name: Workflows: Quick Tasks
item.description: Simple single-agent tasks for everyday work.

request.description: Explain a code snippet in plain English with edge cases.
Paste an error stack trace and get an explanation with fix suggestions.
Describe what you need and get a SQL query with explanation.
Get a regex with explanation and test examples.

item.name: Workflows: Bug Investigation
item.description: 4-step pipeline: Reproducer → Root Cause Analyst → Fixer → Verifier

request.description:
Full bug investigation pipeline.

1. Reproducer: analyzes the bug report
2. Root Cause Analyst: diagnoses the underlying issue
3. Fixer: writes the minimal fix
4. Verifier: reviews the fix and writes test cases

Poll /chain/:chainId to track progress.
Poll this to see which step is currently running.

item.name: Workflows: Security Review
item.description: 3-step pipeline: Security Auditor → Security Engineer → Penetration Tester

request.description:
Full security review pipeline.

1. Security Auditor: finds OWASP vulnerabilities
2. Security Engineer: hardens the code
3. Pen Tester: verifies the hardened code

Poll /chain/:chainId to track progress.

Refactoring pipeline.

1. Code Analyst: identifies smells and issues
2. Refactorer: applies improvements
3. Reviewer: verifies behavior preserved

Poll /chain/:chainId to track progress.

item.name: Workflows: Test Generation
item.description: 3-step pipeline: Test Architect → Test Writer → Test Reviewer

request.description:
Test generation pipeline.

1. Test Architect: plans all test cases
2. Test Writer: implements the Jest suite
3. Test Reviewer: finds coverage gaps

Poll /chain/:chainId to track progress.

Performance audit pipeline.

1. Auditor: finds N+1, memory leaks, bad complexity
2. Optimizer: rewrites with eager loading, caching, pagination

Poll /chain/:chainId to track progress.

item.name: Workflows: PR Review Simulation
item.description: 3-step pipeline: Correctness Reviewer → Robustness Reviewer → PR Author Response

request.description:
Simulated PR review.

1. Correctness Reviewer: logic errors, null handling
2. Robustness Reviewer: edge cases, timeouts
3. PR Author: responds with fixes

Poll /chain/:chainId to track progress.

Progressive learning path about Promises.

1. Beginner: concepts and analogies
2. Intermediate: patterns and async/await
3. Advanced: production patterns and interview prep

Poll /chain/:chainId to track progress.
